sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64174" key="luroghqh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῠρο-γηθής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n64174.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">delighting in the lyre,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525.12</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Par.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.350</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
